name: Side Stitch
author: Craig Duncan (2017) / AGP port
description: Craig Duncan's connection/scoring game (the parent of Exo-Hex): a hexhex-8 board (169 cells) whose perimeter is painted in seven coloured 'sides'. Place one stone per turn (pie rule; pass allowed); stones never move. When the board fills or both players pass, each connected group scores the number of distinct colour-sides it touches (a corner cell where two colours meet counts for both). The owner of the single best group wins, ties broken recursively down the group lists.
